scripts.scrape-lambda:ropewiki: sam build; sam local invoke RopewikiScraper --event events/RopewikiScraperCronEvent.json --env-vars samEnvVars.json --docker-network my-net
scripts.scrape:ropewiki: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass DEV_ENVIRONMENT=local ts-node --files src/ropewiki/main.ts
scripts.local-db:start: docker network create -d bridge my-net; docker run --publish 127.0.0.1:8081:5432/tcp --network=my-net --name local-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=localPass -e POSTGRES_USER=localUser -e POSTGRES_DB=local -d postgres; sleep 0.5; npm run migrate:up
scripts.test-db:start: docker run --publish 127.0.0.1:8080:5432/tcp --name test-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=testPass -e POSTGRES_USER=testUser -e POSTGRES_DB=test -d postgres; sleep 0.5; npm run migrate-test:up
scripts.test-db:delete: docker stop test-db; docker rm test-db
scripts.test:database: TEST_USER=testUser TEST_PASS=testPass TEST_HOST=127.0.0.1 TEST_PORT=8080 TEST_DB=test jest -i --testPathPatterns=/test/ropewiki/database/*
scripts.test:local: npm run test:unit; npm run test-db:start; npm run test:database; npm run test-db:delete
